bm25_search_docs.name: bm25_search_docs
bm25_search_docs.description: Lexical BM25 retrieval over raw text chunks. Use it for exact wording, named entities, aliases, abbreviations, object names, repeated actions, appearance details, and other evidence that depends on literal surface-form matching.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword-style query. Prefer exact names, aliases, distinctive phrases, or answer-option wording you want to verify literally.

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: Maximum number of hits to return. Default 10.

lookup_document_ids_by_title.name: lookup_document_ids_by_title
lookup_document_ids_by_title.description: Map a readable section or chapter title back to backing document_ids. Use when you already know a scene/chapter title and need its source documents for follow-up retrieval. This is a utility lookup, not a direct evidence search tool.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Main title to match. Optional if subtitle is provided.

parameters.name: subtitle
parameters.description: Subtitle or sub-scene title to match. Optional if title is provided.

parameters.name: fuzzy
parameters.description: Whether to allow fuzzy title matching. Default true.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matched document_ids to return. Default 10.

lookup_titles_by_document_ids.name: lookup_titles_by_document_ids
lookup_titles_by_document_ids.description: Map one or more document_ids to readable section or chapter titles. Use after graph or vector tools return source document_ids and you want to understand which scenes/chapters they correspond to. This helps interpret evidence provenance, not answer the question by itself.

parameters.name: document_ids
parameters.description: List of document_ids to resolve into titles.

search_related_content.name: search_related_content
search_related_content.description: Given document_ids plus a question, read the original text of those documents and extract only the content directly relevant to the query. Use as a follow-up after another tool already identified promising document_ids. This is a direct evidence extraction tool for grounding or disambiguation, not a broad search tool.

parameters.name: document_ids
parameters.description: List of source document_ids to inspect. A single string is also accepted internally, but pass a list when possible.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Natural-language question or extraction goal that specifies what evidence to pull from the documents.

parameters.name: max_length
parameters.description: Maximum extracted evidence length per document. Default 300.
